item.title: MDX!
item.description: A post showing MDX in action.

item.title: Getting started
item.description: Nehalem is easy to install due to its packaged nature. Learn how to install it and the basics of the configuration capabilities.

item.title: Features
item.description: Nehalem provides an extensive set of features out of the box. It's fully responsive, SEO optimized, customizable and even more!

item.title: Creating custom pages
item.description: Creating custom pages is easy in Nehalem - let's take a brief look.

item.title: Customizing the theme
item.description: How to change the appearance and component shadowing.

item.title: Creating content
item.description: How to create pages, posts and manage tags.

item.title: Demo
item.description: A simple demo post to show all kinds of different elements.
